name: Sildenafil
indications:
## Main indications

Pulmonary vasodilator for pulmonary hypertension.

> Adjust according to institutional protocol and medical prescription.

pediatrico.presentation: Tablets: 50 mg; Solution (compounded): 2 mg/mL; Ampoules 12.5 mL: 0.8 mg/mL (imported product)
pediatrico.dose: Children and adolescents: initial: 0.5–1 mg/kg/dose every 6–8 h, maximum 4 mg/kg/day up to 20 mg/dose every 8 h; maintenance: 0.25–1 mg/kg/dose every 6–8 h, maximum 4 mg/kg/day up to 20 mg/dose every 8 h. No dose adjustment required in hepatic or renal insufficiency
pediatrico.notes: Restricted indication — specialist use only. Not dialyzable. See sildenafil safety alert.

stability:
## Stability

- Store according to package insert in original container.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

Diarrhea, dyspepsia, rash, dizziness, headache, abnormal vision, nasal congestion.

bibliography.citation: Hospital de Pediatría SAMIC Prof. Dr. Juan P. Garrahan. Institutional Pharmaceutical Formulary — Sildenafil* (code 1530, ATC G04BE).

ANMAT. Drug information and authorized prescribing information in Argentina.
American Heart Association. Pulmonary hypertension guidelines.
European Society of Cardiology. Pulmonary hypertension guidelines.
